title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Zoro, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This folly is comical to watch, but your valiant efforts move me to tears!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I AM GLAD YOU MADE YOUR WAY TO ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy-Taso!! zoro-Taso!! Nami-Taso!! USOP-TASO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He knows our names?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: SAN-TASO!! CHO-TASO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: what's a TASD?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna punch through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Time for a little gear fourth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, usopp...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no one to blame over a natural disaster, right?:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You mean like earthquakes, floods, and storms???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nope, generally those things just happen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good... 'Cause that guy definitely put us through a lot of crap...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's really pissed me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, he's a giant, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I totally get your rage, Nami-san!! I'll never forgive him either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stop thinking about how he got to dress you up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll GRIND HIM TO DUST WITH MY OWN LEGS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Get a grip, Sanji-Kun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides... I have a feeling he's about to feel some divine retribution!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: MUGIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What've you got this time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cawww!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey!! This is the straw hat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: C-Awww!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the giant warrior pirates were guiding them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something must have happened. They're fast asleep... wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they came from egghead, did they go through the sleeping mist belt?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dehe he he he hehe!! This is awesome!! Hajudin joined you all on his own!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Serious- Ly?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He wanted us new giant pirates to serve you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if!! Elbaf's strongest warriors don't follow itty-bitty humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hasn't he got a shred of Pride?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just look at this small, frail body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: O-oh wow!!! It's my queen, Nam-taso!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uh oh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ungh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just go back to sleep...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you're in for a surprise when you wake up... Dehe he he he!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DEHE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE HE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I SEE YOU HAVE NO GLUE WHERE YOU ARE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Stay and run wild here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Now you will serve me!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
